title: To Liberty
content:
Here's to our Goddess, Liberty,
    Idol of bronze and stone!
    May she awake to life some day
    And let her charms be known.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Oliver Herford, titled "To Liberty", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
